zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Robert Rede Sr於1392年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾時，他的父親John Reade52歲，母親Cecilia Harlyungrugge49歲。他和Christina James至少有7個兒子。他去世於1430年10月8日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾肯登享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Robert Rede Sr于1392年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾时，他的父亲John Reade52岁，母亲Cecilia Harlyungrugge49岁。他和Christina James至少有7个儿子。他去世于1430年10月8日在英国英格兰奧可福爾肯登享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Portuguese: habitational name from a place so named in Braga district (Portugal).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Robert Rede Sr was born in 1392, in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Reade, was 52 and his mother, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, was 49. He had at least 7 sons with Christina James. He died on 8 October 1430, in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Robert Rede Sr est né en 1392, à Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Reade, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, avait 49 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils avec Christina James. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1430, à Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Robert Rede Sr 1392 in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Reade 52 und seine Mutter Cecilia Harlyungrugge 49. Er hatte mit Christina James mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1430 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Robert Rede Sr è nato il nel 1392 nel Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Reade, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, aveva 49 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli con Christina James. Morì il 8 ottobre 1430, nel Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Robert Rede Sr(이)가 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 보르스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Reade(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Harlyungrugge(은)는 49세였다. 그는 Christina James(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1430년 10월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 체c켄던에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Robert Rede Sr nasceu em 1392, em Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Reade, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, tinha 49 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Robert Rede Sr родился в 1392 г. в местности боарсталл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Reade было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Harlyungrugge, 49. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей от Christina James. Он умер 8 октября 1430 г. в местности чеккендон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
